description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a large, black screen framed by a moderately thick bezel, with subtle horizontal texturing along the sides. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand that connects centrally to the rear panel, providing stability. On the back, several input/output ports are visible, arranged in a horizontal row near the center, suggesting connectivity for various devices. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a matte finish, and the design is modern and minimalistic. A small brand logo is visible at the center of the bottom bezel on the front.
description: A slim, black flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular pedestal stand and visible rear ports. The front features a wide screen with a moderately thick bezel and a central brand logo.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the monitor's ultra-slim depth and the angled pedestal stand.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the monitor's input/output ports and the central attachment of the pedestal stand.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and the stand's rear extension.
description_view_3: The front view displays the wide black screen, moderately thick bezel, and a small brand logo at the bottom center.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, black, and has a subtle horizontal texture along the sides, with squared corners and a matte plastic appearance.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a flat, wide base and a central vertical support, made of matte black plastic.
attribute_button_placement: Buttons are located on the rear panel, grouped together near the center below the ports.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, with at least three ports arranged horizontally.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is visible at the center of the bottom bezel on the front.
